_comment: Initial zero baseline — populated on first clean run after the match service ships. CI compares against this and fails when current metrics drop > 5% absolute.
_validation_note_2026-05-03_v2-7-4: Verified end-to-end against live LanceDB index. match_element returns ranked candidates with score ~0.82 against typical golden_set inputs. Rule-based judge reports all zero because the *current* indexed catalog uses test-fixture codes (e.g. 'T12-10b9a262', 'B001') rather than the real CWICR codes that golden_set entries reference. The eval pipeline is functional — meaningful numbers will appear once a real CWICR import lands AND golden_set codes are updated to match (or LLM-judge mode is used so semantic match works even without code overlap).
